rulings.Case Title: STRATEGIC OUT SOURCE VS. EXECUTIVE DIRECTION, INC.
rulings.Rulings: Demurrer - SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO PLEAD BREACH OF CONTRACT. CAUSE OF ACTION CURRENTLY CONVOLUTED GIVEN REFERENCE TO MULTIPLE CONTRACTS, SOME OF WHICH INCLUDE ARBITRATION CLAUSES. SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO TRADE SECRET MISAPPROPRIATION. "MISAPPROPRIATION" NOT PROPERLY PLEADED GIVEN THAT BOTH PARTIES OWN THE ALLEGED SECRETS. See CC 3246.1. SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 5 AND 12 [UNFAIR COMPETITION] TO PLEAD CAUSES OF ACTION UNDER B&P 17200. OVERRULE AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 6 [TORTIOUS INTERFERENCE]. SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 9TH CAUSE OF ACTION [LIBEL/SLANDER] TO IDENTIFY FALSE STATEMENT OF FACT. Motion to Strike = OFF CALENDAR AS MOOT GIVEN THAT X-COMPLAINANT IS GIVEN LEAVE TO AMEND 9TH CAUSE OF ACTION. (PB)

rulings.Case Title: PHILLIP ANSELMO VS. JESSICA BOSWELL et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ccp 473 Mtn For Relief Form Clerk'S Error
rulings.Rulings: MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM MISTAKE GRANTED, AND PLAINTIFF HAS LEAVE TO FILE A FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT, IF PLAINTIFF PROVIDES PROOF OF TIMELY SERVICE OF THIS MOTION ON DEFENDANTS. (JH)

rulings.Case Title: EDUARDO MANZANAREZ et al VS. ROBERT LOW et al
rulings.Rulings: DEMURRER SUSTAINED TO ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND ON GROUND ACTION BARRED BY RELEASE IN SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (AA)
